   FirstName & "  " & LastName,

)

fields.calculatedFormula: IF( Data_Score__c =100,"All Contact Details Captured", "Missing: "&IF( LEN( Phone ) = 0, "Phone, ","")&""&IF(LEN( Email) = 0, "Email, ","")&""&IF( LEN( MailingStreet ) = 0, "Complete Address, ","")&""&IF( LEN(Title) = 0, "Job Title, ","")&""&IF( ISPICKVAL( Role_Function__c,""), "Role/Function, ","")&""&IF( ISPICKVAL( Salutation,""), "Salutation",""))
fields.label: Data Quality Description
fields.name: Data_Quality_Description__c

fields.calculatedFormula: IF( LEN( Phone) = 0, 0,20) + IF( LEN( Email) = 0, 0,20) + IF( LEN(MailingStreet) = 0, 0,10) + IF( LEN(Title) = 0, 0,20) + IF( ISPICKVAL(Salutation,""), 0,10)+ IF( ISPICKVAL(Role_Function__c,""), 0,20)
fields.label: Data Quality Score
fields.name: Data_Score__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "3Com"), "3Com;" + BR(), NULL) +
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "Alcatel"), "Alcatel;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "Cisco"), "Cisco;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "Extreme"), "Extreme;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "F5"), "F5;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "Foundry"), "Foundry;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "HP"), "HP;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "HPE"), "HPE;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "IBM hardware;"), "IBM hardware" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "IBM software;"), "IBM software" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "Juniper"), "Juniper;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "Lenovo"), "Lenovo;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "Nortel"), "Nortel;" + BR(), NULL) + 
if(INCLUDES(Account.Client_Infrastructure__c, "Other"), "Other", NULL)
fields.label: Account Infrastructure
fields.name: Account_Infrastructure__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
The Dun & Bradstreet D-U-N-S Number with which the contact is
associated. The D-U-N-S Number is an identification number
assigned by Dun & Bradstreet that uniquely identifies the entity in
accordance with the Data Universal Numbering System (D-U-N-S).
fields.label: D&B Contact DUNS Number
fields.name: D_B_Contact_DUNS_Number__c

fields.inlineHelpText: An identification number that uniquely defines a D&B contact.
fields.label: D&B Contact ID
fields.name: D_B_Contact_ID__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
A sequence of digits used for voice communication with the entity.
This sequence of digits includes the area code or city code and
domestic dialing code.
fields.label: D&B Contact Phone
fields.name: D_B_Contact_Phone__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The email address of the contact.
fields.label: D&B Email Address
fields.name: D_B_Email_Address__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The predicted probability that a contact can be reached by the email listed for the contact, at the time of the most recent email verification.
fields.label: D&B Email Deliverability Score
fields.name: D_B_Email_Deliverability_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
A formula field associated with Email Deliverability Score that
identifies the quality range within which the score falls: 0-19 "Very
Poor", 20-39 "Poor", 40-79 "Fair", 80-89 "Good", 90-100 "Excellent".
fields.label: D&B Email Deliverability
fields.name: D_B_Email_Deliverability__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The given name of the individual.
fields.label: D&B First Name
fields.name: D_B_First_Name__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The job held by the entity.
fields.label: D&B Job Title
fields.name: D_B_Job_Title__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The family name of the individual.
fields.label: D&B Last Name
fields.name: D_B_Last_Name__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
The predicted probability (from 0 to 100) that a contact can be
reached at least one of their listed phone numbers, at the time of the
most recent phone verification. Decays at a rate of 2 points each
month.
fields.label: D&B Phone Accuracy Score
fields.name: D_B_Phone_Accuracy_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText: A formula field associated with Phone Accuracy Score that identifies the quality range within which the score falls: 0-19 "Very Poor", 20-39 "Poor", 40-79 "Fair", 80-89 "Good", 90-100 "Excellent".
fields.label: D&B Phone Accuracy
fields.name: D_B_Phone_Accuracy__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Upon a successful match, D&B Connect populates this field that links the Contact record to a specific D-U-N-S Number for display of a custom object with D&B data.
fields.label: D&B Connect Company Profile
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Connect_Company_Profile__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Upon a successful Contact match, D&B Connect populates this field that links the Contact record to a specific Contact ID for display of a custom object with D&B data.
fields.label: D&B Connect Contact Profile
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Connect_Contact_Profile__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
The driver explaining how the resulting match was found.
Possible values include:
Contact ID Lookup
Email Lookup
Company + Contact Match
Company Family + Contact Match
Company Only Match
fields.label: D&B Contact Match Driver
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Contact_Match_Driver__c

fields.inlineHelpText: A numeric value from 1 (low) up to 10 (high) indicating the level of certainty at which this possible candidate was included in this result set.
fields.label: D&B Match Confidence Code
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Match_Confidence_Code__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The information that the matching process used to arrive at a match in addition to the application's business rules and parameters specified by the requestor. This is a 28-byte string consisting of 14 components of 2 bytes each. The 14 components are, in order, Name, Street Number, Street Name, Town Name, Territory Name, P.O. Box, Telephone, Post Code, D-U-N-S Number, Industry Code, Geographical Density, Location Uniqueness, Registration Number and URL.
fields.label: D&B Match Data Profile
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Match_Data_Profile__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The compound rating that comprises one rating per type of data scored by a match engine. For example, in AABZBAAAFBZ the "A"; in the 1st position means that the Name scored between 80-100 and the "A"; in the 2nd position means that the Street Number had to score exactly 100. For more details, please see the Identity Resolution guide.
fields.label: D&B Match Grade
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Match_Grade__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
The type of match performed to identify the identified entity. May be one of the following:
DUNS Number Lookup: D-U-N-S Number was used to perform match.
Name and Address Lookup: Name and Address were used to perform match.
National ID Lookup: Registration Number was used to perform match.
Telephone Number Lookup: Telephone Number was used to perform match.
ZIP Code Lookup: Postal Code was used to perform match.
Note: This parameter is not applicable for Multi-Process High-Volume Match.
fields.label: D&B Match Type
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Match_Type__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
A number from -1 to 100 (including decimals) that indicates the detailed level of match on the name of the matched candidate.
0 indicates no match.
100 indicates most accurate match.
Note: This parameter is not applicable for Multi-Process High-Volume Match.
fields.label: D&B Name Match Score
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Name_Match_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText: This field can be different from the D-U-N-S value held in the custom object. Refer to the Match Driver field for more details on how this record was matched.
fields.label: Matched D-U-N-S
fields.name: DNBConnect__matchedDuns__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
Determine if a portal user record was created by indicating its' status.
No status? Then no portal user record exists.
fields.label: Portal User Status
fields.name: Portal_User_Status__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Check if Contact is related to multiple accounts and the one they are current related to is the direct account.  Important for customers with Portal licenses.  If it is not checked, it could flip the direct relationship due to Epicor integration flipping the direct relationship every time a contact is updated.
fields.label: Relationship Lock
fields.name: Relationship_Lock__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Field automatically updated by LinkedIn Sales Navigator Data Validation. “Not at Company” means Contact is not with associated Account based on LinkedIn profile. No value indicates LinkedIn has no feedback to share.
fields.label: Not at Company Flag
fields.name: LID__No_longer_at_Company__c
